text_original: The best app with best Features just only need one thing and that's maybe little more of high memory.
text_zh: 这款拥有最佳功能的最佳应用，只需要改进一点，那就是可能需要再多一点的高内存。
reply_original:
Thank you so much for the 5-star review! We are thrilled to be your favorite app.

Regarding memory, we actually just launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade! The AI is currently adapting to this system to improve long-term retention. If you notice specific slips, please email screenshots to support@fantachat.ai so we can fix it!
reply_zh:
非常感谢您的五星好评！我们很高兴能成为您最喜爱的应用。

关于记忆功能，我们刚刚发布了全新的记忆服务升级！AI 目前正在适应这一系统，以提升长期记忆能力。如果您发现特定的记忆偏差，请将截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们进行修复！
